issue_title: When both fixed and includeSpinner input options are set to false loading-bar is hidden
issue_body_preview:
When setting the `fixed` and `includeSpinner` input properties to `false` the loading-bar is not visible irrespective of `includeBar` input is set to `true`.

Check this demo: https://stackblitz.com/edit/angular-nvgyoa

```ts
<ngx-loading-bar [includeSpinner]="false" [fixed]="false" [includeBar
test_description_zh: 在页面中使用 ngx-loading-bar 组件，将 fixed 设置为 false、includeSpinner 设置为 false、includeBar 设置为 true，触发加载操作后观察加载进度条是否可见。
expected_result_zh: 加载进度条（bar 部分）应正常显示并可见，不应因 fixed 和 includeSpinner 同时为 false 而导致整个加载条被隐藏。
